children.text: Appearance & Personality
children.translation: 外貌与性格

children.text: My best friend is Li Hua.
children.translation: 我最好的朋友是李华。

children.text: We look very different.
children.translation: 我们看起来非常不同。

children.text: I am taller than him, but he is slimmer than me.
children.translation: 我比他高，但他比我苗条。

children.text: I am very outgoing and enjoy playing sports.
children.translation: 我非常外向并且喜欢运动。

children.text: However, he is a bit shy and quiet.
children.translation: 然而，他有一点害羞和安静。

children.text: Hobbies, Study, Sports & Learning
children.translation: 兴趣、学习、运动与学习他人

children.text: Although we are different, we have some hobbies in common.
children.translation: 虽然我们不同，但我们有一些共同的爱好。

children.text: We both like reading in our spare time.
children.translation: 我们俩都喜欢在空闲时间阅读。

children.text: In study, he works harder than me.
children.translation: 在学习上，他比我更努力。

children.text: He always gets good grades.
children.translation: 他总是取得好成绩。

children.text: I want to learn from his hard-working spirit.
children.translation: 我想向他的勤奋精神学习。

children.text: In sports, he plays basketball better than me.
children.translation: 在运动中，他篮球打得比我好。

children.text: He is always there to lend me a hand when I practice.
children.translation: 当我练习时，他总是在那里帮助我。
children.highlight: always, lend me a hand, practice

children.text: He is a true friend who touches my heart.
children.translation: 他是一个触动我心扉的真朋友。

children.text: Appearance & Personality
children.translation: 外貌与性格

children.text: My best friend is Li Hua.
children.translation: 我最好的朋友是李华。

children.text: Although we look quite alike, we actually have different appearances and personalities.
children.translation: 虽然我们看起来很像，但实际上我们有着不同的外表和性格。
children.highlight: Although, look quite alike, different, appearances, personalities

children.text: For example, he is a bit taller and slimmer than me.
children.translation: 例如，他比我稍微高一点、苗条一点。

children.text: Personality-wise, I am extremely outgoing and loud, while he is a quiet and serious person.
children.translation: 性格方面，我非常外向和大声，而他是一个安静和严肃的人。

children.text: Nevertheless, we get along very well.
children.translation: 然而，我们相处得非常好。

children.text: Hobbies, Study, Sports & Learning
children.translation: 兴趣、学习、运动与学习他人

children.text: In fact, we have many interests in common.
children.translation: 事实上，我们有许多共同的兴趣。

children.text: In our spare time, we both enjoy reading, though I prefer history books and he reads more novels.
children.translation: 在我们的空闲时间，我们两个都喜欢阅读，尽管我更喜欢历史书而他读更多的小说。
children.highlight: spare time, both, enjoy, though, novels

children.text: When it comes to study, he is much more hard-working than me.
children.translation: 说到学习，他比我勤奋得多。

children.text: Thanks to his help, I can solve difficult maths problems now.
children.translation: 由于他的帮助，我现在可以解答难的数学题了。

children.text: Furthermore, he has a great sense of humour and always makes me laugh when I make a mistake.
children.translation: 此外，他极具幽默感，并且在我犯错误时总是逗我笑。
children.highlight: Furthermore, sense of humour, makes me laugh, make a mistake

children.text: In sports, he plays basketball better than me.
children.translation: 在运动方面，他篮球打得比我好。

children.text: Whenever I need help, he is always ready to lend me a hand.
children.translation: 每当高我需要帮助，他总是准备好向我伸出援手。

children.text: I am lucky to have such an honest and true friend who touches my heart.
children.translation: 我很幸运有这样一个触动我心扉的坦诚且真实的朋友。
children.highlight: lucky, honest, true friend, touches my heart
